zh.Gawsworth, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward de Fitton於1220年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight46歲，母親Ellen fitz Elias42歲。他和Mary Harbottle至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1271年之後在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Gawsworth, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward de Fitton于1220年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight46岁，母亲Ellen fitz Elias42岁。他和Mary Harbottle至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1271年之后在英国英格兰諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward de Fitton was born in 1220, in Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, was 46 and his mother, Ellen fitz Elias, was 42. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Mary Harbottle. He died after 1271, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward de Fitton est né en 1220, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ellen fitz Elias, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Mary Harbottle. Il est décédé après 1271, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward de Fitton 1220 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight 46 und seine Mutter Ellen fitz Elias 42. Er hatte mit Mary Harbottle mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1271 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Fitton è nato il nel 1220 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Ellen fitz Elias, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Mary Harbottle. Morì dopo il 1271, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Fitton(이)가 1220년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen fitz Elias(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Mary Harbottle(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Fitton nasceu em 1220, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ellen fitz Elias, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Mary Harbottle. Ele faleceu após 1271, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward de Fitton родился в 1220 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen fitz Elias, 42. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Mary Harbottle. Он умер после 1271 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward de Fitton nació en 1220, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ellen fitz Elias, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Mary Harbottle. Murió después de 1271, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
